properties.displayName: [WEEKLY] Cross-category credential-store enumeration with rapid egress to anonymizing tunnel/CDN
properties.description:
Detects a single endpoint process that touches credential material from THREE or more distinct categories — browser logins/cookies, DevOps & cloud secrets (.aws, .kube, .npmrc, .pypirc, .docker, .git-credentials, .netrc), SSH private keys, DPAPI/Vault/Credential-Manager stores, password-manager vaults, or crypto-wallet directories — within a 5-minute window, AND the same host egresses to an anonymizing tunnel or CDN (bore.pub, *.trycloudflare.com, *.ngrok.io, *.workers.dev, *.web.app, pastebin/transfer.sh, Telegram API) within 10 minutes of the last credential read. This fortnight saw at least eight distinct intrusion lures converge on identical actions-on-objectives: PCPJack cloud-worm and TeamPCP-eviction (SentinelLabs, BleepingComputer 2026-05-07), PamDOORa PAM backdoor on Linux (THN/CSN 2026-05-08), QLNX Quasar Linux RAT (THN 2026-05-08), MuddyWater Teams-vishing false-flag ransomware (THN 2026-05-06), CloudZ RAT/Pheno plugin via Windows Phone Link (THN 2026-05-06), DEEP#DOOR Python backdoor exfilling over bore.pub (THN 2026-04-30), malicious NuGet packages (CSN 2026-05-07), Fake OpenClaw installer hitting 250+ extensions (CSN 2026-05-08), event-invitation phishing (CSN 2026-05-07), and the SAP-npm supply-chain compromise (BleepingComputer 2026-04-29) — all delivery paths differ but the collection+exfiltration stage is the same heterogeneous-secret fan-out followed by tunneled egress. Spans Collection (T1555/T1552/T1539) and Exfiltration (T1041/T1567/T1572) — the only two kill-chain stages every article shares. FIRES when one process_guid (or PID on the same host within 60s) reads ≥3 distinct credential CATEGORIES then the host egresses to a tunneling/CDN host or otherwise-rare public destination. DOES NOT FIRE on browsers reading only their own cookie/Login-Data store, native password managers reading their own vault, git/aws-cli/kubectl/npm reading a single category for legitimate use, or baselined backup/EDR/SCM agents.

Rationale: Every one of the 12 articles converges on the same actions-on-objectives step regardless of the unique delivery vector — enumerate every credential store the user has and exfiltrate them, often via an anonymizing tunnel (bore.pub in DEEP#DOOR, *.cloudfront-js.com in PCPJack, *.njalla in NuGet packages, Telegram/transfer.sh elsewhere). Catching the rare combination 'one process touches ≥3 credential-store CATEGORIES inside 5 min, then the host beacons to a tunneling/CDN host within 10 min' is invariant to which CVE was exploited, which lure was used, or which IOC rotates next week, while remaining structurally rare in legitimate use (browsers, password managers, and dev CLIs each stay inside a single category).
properties.query:
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let FanoutWindow = 5m;
let EgressWindow = 10m;
let _tunnel_domains = dynamic(["bore.pub","trycloudflare.com","ngrok.io","ngrok-free.app","workers.dev","web.app","pages.dev","transfer.sh","pastebin.com","api.telegram.org","serveo.net","localtunnel.me","loca.lt","cloudfront-js.com"]);
let _allow_procs = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","keepass.exe","1password.exe","bitwarden.exe","git","git.exe","aws","aws.exe","kubectl","kubectl.exe","docker","docker.exe","MsMpEng.exe","OneDrive.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let CredReads = ImFileEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackHours)
| where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileAccessed","FileRenamed")
| where ActingProcessName !in~ (_allow_procs)
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| extend cred_cat = case(
    TargetFilePath matches regex @"(?i)(Login Data|Cookies|logins\.json|key4\.db|Web Data)", "browser",
    TargetFilePath matches regex @"(?i)(\.aws[\\/]credentials|\.kube[\\/]config|\.npmrc|\.pypirc|\.git-credentials|\.docker[\\/]config|\.netrc|\.azure[\\/]|gcloud[\\/]|\.vault-token)", "devops",
    TargetFilePath matches regex @"(?i)\.ssh[\\/](id_|known_hosts)", "ssh",
    TargetFilePath matches regex @"(?i)Microsoft[\\/](Protect|Credentials|Vault|Crypto)[\\/]", "dpapi",
    TargetFilePath matches regex @"(?i)(Ethereum|Exodus|Electrum|Atomic|MetaMask|nkbihfbeogaeaoehlefnkodbefgpgknn|keystore)", "wallet",
    TargetFilePath matches regex @"(?i)(KeePass|1Password|Bitwarden|\.kdbx|\.opvault|password-store)", "passmgr",
    "")
| where isnotempty(cred_cat)
| summarize FanoutFirst = min(TimeGenerated), FanoutLast = max(TimeGenerated),
            CategoryCount = dcount(cred_cat),
            Categories = make_set(cred_cat),
            FilesTouched = make_set(TargetFilePath, 100)
            by DvcHostname, ActingProcessId, ActingProcessName, ActorUsername,
               bin(TimeGenerated, FanoutWindow)
| where CategoryCount >= 3;
let Egress = ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackHours)
| where DvcAction != "Deny"
| where isnotempty(DstIpAddr) and not(ipv4_is_private(DstIpAddr))
| where Url has_any (_tunnel_domains) or DstHostname has_any (_tunnel_domains)
     or Url has_any (dynamic(["<c2_domain_list>"]))
| project EgressTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
          EgressProcess = ActingProcessName,
          Url, DstHostname, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber;
CredReads
| join kind=inner Egress on DvcHostname
| where EgressTime between (FanoutFirst .. FanoutLast + EgressWindow)
| extend DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', EgressTime, FanoutLast)
| project FanoutFirst, FanoutLast, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          FanoutProcess = ActingProcessName, FanoutPid = ActingProcessId,
          CategoryCount, Categories, FilesTouched,
          EgressTime, EgressProcess, Url, DstHostname, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber, DelaySec
| order by FanoutFirst desc
